# Meridian

Meridian is a web-scale evidence compiler for IPO alpha research.

## Core capability
- `ipo_dislocation_score(company_id, as_of_ts, horizon_days=28)`
- Returns: `score`, `uncertainty`, `top_drivers`, `decay_half_life_days`, `evidence_graph_id`, `lineage_hash`

## Why Meridian
- Compiles evidence graphs from high-throughput crawls.
- Uses agentic contradiction analysis (Claim, Reality, Novelty, Skeptic, Portfolio agents).
- Produces deterministic lineage and reproducible signal cards.

## API surface
- `POST /v1/ipo/score`
- `GET /v1/ipo/{company_id}/evidence-graph?as_of=...`
- `POST /v1/ipo/backtest`
- `GET /v1/system/throughput`

## Repository map
- `python/meridian/api.py`: FastAPI endpoints
- `python/meridian/scoring.py`: flagship scoring function
- `python/meridian/agents.py`: multi-agent scoring logic
- `python/meridian/dom_analyzer.py`: DOM extraction + fallback
- `python/meridian/storage.py`: Postgres/in-memory persistence
- `cpp/src/`: async data-plane engine skeleton
- `db/schema.sql`: queue, facts, signal card, lineage schema
- `landing/index.html`: project landing page + FAQ

## Safety and scope
- Shadow research only; not live execution.
- Claims and metrics must be validated in your environment.
